understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid, using horizontal moves and gravity-based vertical falls, supported by tile clicks to remove breakable blocks ('x') that block progress.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is limited to MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT; after a horizontal move, gravity automatically pulls the character until landing on a solid tile or hitting a hazard. Spikes ('u'/'v') end the run. CLICK targets and removes breakable blocks at given coordinates. UNDO reverts the last action. The corridor scan shows landing positions per column, and passages indicate drops to new vertical sections. Gravity direction determines fall direction: DOWN gravity means falling toward smaller y (top), UP means falling toward larger y (bottom). Click actions do not advance the moving platform timer on early levels.
